commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared chart hover helper and tests, narrows Cost/Credits/Usage/Plan Utilization hover selection to bar bodies, uses calendar day stepping, and removes visible Cost row detail lines while preserving tooltip details.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and inspected media: current main uses midpoint hover bands and visible Cost detail lines, and the before screenshot shows the over-wide band and inline details. I did not run the macOS app in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the tooltip-only Cost row decision and normal merge gating.

target.title: fix: scope chart selection band to bar width and remove cost item detail lines
target.body: ## Summary - shrink chart selection band from midpoint-to-midpoint to bar width: use calendar-day slot width so the grey highlight sits under the bar regardless of gaps in the data - keep selection on the last hovered bar when cursor is between bars — no longer jumps to nearest at the midpoint - keep a single selectable day active across the full plot; no inter-bar gap exists in that case - apply same fix to `CostHistoryChartMenuView`, `CreditsHistoryChartMenuView`, and `UsageBreakdownChartMenuView`; `PlanUtilizationHistoryChartMenuView` uses `Layout.barWidth / 2` since bars are fixed-width - advance chart days with `Calendar` instead of fixed 86,400-second offsets so bar geometry remains correct across daylight-saving transitions - remove "Today" and "Last 30 days" detail lines from the Cost menu item; cost info remains available in the tooltip on hover ## Tests - update `StatusMenuCostMenuCardTests` to assert new behavior: `costMenuVisibleDetailLines` returns `[]` and fallback attributed title is plain "Cost" - add pure hover-selection regressions for single-bar, multi-bar, spring-forward, and fall-back behavior - focused chart and cost-menu suites passed 17 tests, 0 failures - full sharded suite passed all 42 groups, 0 failures - `make check` passed; SwiftFormat clean, SwiftLint 0 violations - whole-branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings ## Verification - built and ran locally; selection band visually confirmed to sit under bar body - band renders identically for all bars including first/last and bars with large data gaps - Cost menu item shows "Cost" with submenu arrow only — no detail lines - final head `a414aa52` is based on current `main` `4eb67b21`; range-diff preserves both contributor commits exactly ## Screenshots Before: After:
target.author: elijahfriedman
